description: Structured market state summary: mood and key drivers.

mood.description: One word: Confident, Optimistic, Calm, Mixed, Cautious, Nervous, Worried, Fearful.

moodDetail.description: One short sentence explaining why investors feel that way.

drivers.description: 2-3 key drivers; use exact shift headlines and tie to channels.

headline.description: Exact headline from one of the active market shifts.

detail.description: One simple sentence explaining the driver, tied to channel taxonomy when possible.
